nodes.name: 新幾內亞島
nodes.summary: 新幾內亞島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联312种鸟类，包括南方鶴鴕、鵲鵝、细斑树鸭等312种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 澳大利亚
nodes.summary: 澳大利亚是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联221种鸟类，包括南方鶴鴕、鵲鵝、细斑树鸭等221种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 鹽鹼灘
nodes.summary: 鹽鹼灘是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联11种鸟类，包括大杓鹬、大黑背鸥、彩鹮等11种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 湿地排水
nodes.summary: 湿地被排干转为农业或建设用地。

nodes.name: 湿地退化
nodes.summary: 湿地水文和植被结构被改变导致适宜生境下降。

nodes.name: 湿地
nodes.summary: 湿地是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联56种鸟类，包括鵲鵝、澳洲硬尾鸭、黑天鹅等56种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 湿地
nodes.summary: 浅水、沼泽与植被斑块组成的高生产力生态系统。

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

nodes.name: Black-backed bittern
nodes.summary: Black-backed bittern（Black-backed bittern，学名 Botaurus dubius），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联4个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括湿地、沼泽，主要威胁包括湿地退化、湿地排水。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: * Ixobrychus minutus dubius Mathews, 1912 * Ixobrychus minutus alisteri Mathews, 1913 * Ixobrychus minutus queenslandicus Mathews, 1914 * Ixobrychus minutus victoria Mathews, 1915 * Ixobrychus novaezelandiae dubius | range_map = Ixobrychus dubius map.svg }} The black-backed bittern (Botaurus dubius), also known as the black-backed least bittern or Australian little bittern, is a little-known species of heron in the family Ardeidae found in Australia and vagrant to southern New Guinea

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: * Ixobrychus minutus dubius Mathews, 1912 * Ixobrychus minutus alisteri Mathews, 1913 * Ixobrychus minutus queenslandicus Mathews, 1914 * Ixobrychus minutus victoria Mathews, 1915 * Ixobrychus novaezelandiae dubius | range_map = Ixobrychus dubius map.svg }} The black-backed bittern (Botaurus dubius), also known as the black-backed least bittern or Australian little bittern, is a little-known species of heron in the family Ardeidae found in Australia and vagrant to southern New Guinea

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The birds are mainly found in freshwater wetlands, where they inhabit dense emergent vegetation of reeds and sedges, and inundated shrub thickets

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: They are also occasionally found in brackish and saline wetlands such as mangrove swamps, Juncus-dominated salt marsh and the wooded margins of coastal lagoons

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The birds are mainly found in freshwater wetlands, where they inhabit dense emergent vegetation of reeds and sedges, and inundated shrub thickets

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: They are also occasionally found in brackish and saline wetlands such as mangrove swamps, Juncus-dominated salt marsh and the wooded margins of coastal lagoons

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Threats include various ongoing wetland degradation factors such as salinisation, drainage and the diversion of water for irrigation, as well as the destruction of nesting habitat by inappropriate burning regimens
